---
title: "Preserving Survey Data"
author: 
  - "Lars Vilhuber"
  - "Laurel Krovetz"
date: June 14 2026
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [night, style.css]
    scrollable: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    reference-location: document
    width: 1200
    height: 675
    widescreen: true
    center: true
    transition: slide
    logo: logo.png
    footer: ""
    slide-number: true
    preview-links: false
    chalkboard:
      theme: chalkboard

---


```{r config,include=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(here)
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(qualtRics)
library(lubridate)
library(qrcode)

source(here::here("presentation",'global-libraries.R'))
# The repository name

message(Sys.getenv("GITHUB_REPOSITORY"))

# Process the repository name to generate the URL
# - split the two components
# - combine them into a URL with 'github.io' in the middle

SUBDIRECTORY <- "presentation/" # Leave this empty if this file is in the main directory of the repository

GITHUB_REPOSITORY <- Sys.getenv("GITHUB_REPOSITORY")
GITHUB_REPOSITORY_PARTS <- strsplit(GITHUB_REPOSITORY, "/")[[1]]
REPOSITORY_URL <- paste0("https://github.com/", GITHUB_REPOSITORY)

WEBSITE_URL <- paste0("https://", GITHUB_REPOSITORY_PARTS[1], ".github.io/", GITHUB_REPOSITORY_PARTS[2], "/", SUBDIRECTORY)
WEBSITE_SHORT <- paste0(GITHUB_REPOSITORY_PARTS[1], ".github.io/", GITHUB_REPOSITORY_PARTS[2], "/", SUBDIRECTORY)


```
{{< include ../00-survey-config.Rmd >}}

{{< include 00-follow-along.md >}}

# The problem of credibility

{{< include 10-credibility.md >}}

# A generic survey workflow

{{< include 20-generic-workflow.md >}}

# Modern verification processes

{{< include 30-verification.md >}}

# Outline of the tutorial

{{< include 40-goals.md >}}

{{< include 41-notes-on-goals.md >}}

# Demonstrating the core steps in R

{{< include 50-core-steps.md >}}

{{< include 51-qualtrics-creating-survey.md >}}

{{< include 52-qualtrics-survey-specs.md >}}

{{< include 53-qrcode-survey.md >}}

{{< include 54-qualtrics-data.md >}}

{{< include 55-loading-data-R.md >}}

{{< include 56-cleaning-R.md >}}

{{< include 57-saving-R.md >}}

# Stepping it up

{{< include 60-stepping-up.md >}}

{{< include 61-qualtrics-api.md >}}

{{< include 62-qualtrics-api-key.md >}}

{{< include 63-qualtrics-api-issues.md >}}

# Secrets

{{< include 64-secrets.md >}}

# Checksums
{{< include 65-checksums.md >}}

# Preservation 

{{< include 66-dataverse.md >}}

{{< include 67-trusted-systems.md >}}

# Demonstrating with the live example

{{< include 71-survey-results.md >}}

# The replication package

{{< include 80-replication-package.md >}}

# Does it prevent all fraud?

{{< include 90-not-all-fraud.md >}}

# The end! Thanks for your attention.
